question_text: Little interest or pleasure in doing things
clinical_definition: Diminished interest or pleasure in usual activities nearly every day for at least two weeks
natural_language_patterns: I do not enjoy anything anymore;Nothing feels fun;I stopped caring about my hobbies;I do not feel like doing anything;Things I used to love feel meaningless
functional_impact_examples: I stopped going out;I avoid social activities;I no longer participate in hobbies;I stay isolated at home;I lost motivation for daily tasks
severity_indicators: nearly every day;most of the day;persistent;lack of motivation;lasting for weeks

clinical_definition: Persistent sadness low mood or hopelessness nearly every day for at least two weeks
natural_language_patterns: I feel down all the time;I feel empty;Everything feels hopeless;It feels heavy inside;I cannot see things getting better
functional_impact_examples: It is hard to get through the day;I struggle to complete responsibilities;I withdraw from others;My mood affects my work or study
severity_indicators: nearly every day;most of the day;chronic sadness;lasting weeks

question_text: Trouble falling or staying asleep or sleeping too much
clinical_definition: Insomnia or hypersomnia occurring frequently during depressive episodes
natural_language_patterns: I cannot sleep at night;I wake up many times;I sleep too much;My sleep schedule is broken;I feel exhausted after sleeping
functional_impact_examples: I miss work because of sleep;I cannot wake up on time;I nap excessively;I feel tired during daily activities

question_text: Feeling tired or having little energy
clinical_definition: Persistent fatigue or reduced energy nearly every day
natural_language_patterns: I am tired all the time;I have no energy;Getting out of bed feels impossible;I feel drained;Even small tasks exhaust me
functional_impact_examples: I cannot finish tasks;I fall behind at work;I skip responsibilities;I struggle with daily chores

clinical_definition: Significant decrease or increase in appetite during depressive episodes
natural_language_patterns: I barely eat;Food does not taste good;I eat more than usual;I forget to eat;I binge without thinking
functional_impact_examples: I lose weight unintentionally;I gain weight;My eating habits affect my routine;I skip meals

question_text: Feeling bad about yourself or that you are a failure or have let yourself or your family down
clinical_definition: Feelings of worthlessness excessive guilt or self blame
natural_language_patterns: I feel like a failure;Everything is my fault;I do not deserve happiness;I let everyone down;I feel worthless
functional_impact_examples: I avoid people because I feel ashamed;I cannot accept praise;I isolate due to guilt;persistent self blame

question_text: Trouble concentrating on things such as reading or watching television
clinical_definition: Reduced ability to think focus or concentrate
natural_language_patterns: I cannot focus;My mind goes blank;I forget things easily;I lose track of conversations;I feel mentally slow
functional_impact_examples: I struggle to complete assignments;I make mistakes at work;I fall behind academically;I cannot follow tasks

question_text: Moving or speaking slowly or being restless
clinical_definition: Psychomotor agitation or retardation observable by others
natural_language_patterns: I feel slowed down;I move very slowly;I cannot sit still;I feel restless inside;People notice I act differently
functional_impact_examples: I take longer to complete tasks;Others comment on my behavior;I feel physically uncomfortable;I pace around frequently
